recent_excerpts: CVE-2026-33829 in Windows Snipping Tool allows attackers to steal NTLMv2 hashes via malicious links. A public PoC exploit targets the ms-screensketch protocol to enable credential relay attacks.
Microsoft released out-of-band updates for Windows Server 2019 and 2022 after April 2026 security patches caused boot failures and domain controller authentication issues, forcing some administrators
Microsoft's April 2026 Patch Tuesday adds a critical warning dialog to Windows Remote Desktop, blocking threat actors from using malicious .rdp files to steal credentials via phishing.
